name: Oatmeal Apple Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Preparation Time: 25 minutes Bake Time: 13 minutes
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F. Grease a baking sheet with Butter Flavor Crisco and set aside.
2. In a large bowl, cream together the Butter Flavor Crisco, brown sugar, milk, vanilla extract using an electric mixer on medium speed until well blended.
3. In a separate bowl, mix together the flour, cinnamon, nutmeg, baking soda, and salt.
4. Add the dry mixture to the creamed mixture and stir until combined. Stir in raisins and walnut pieces (if using), then stir in the oats.
5. Drop rounded tablespoonfuls of dough 2 inches apart onto the prepared baking sheet.
6. Bake for 13 minutes. Allow to cool for 2 minutes on the baking sheet before transferring to a cooling rack.
Makes 2 1/2 dozen cookies.
